description: Run a mandatory project-shaping decision gate with evidence options trade-offs and user approval.
Resolve a DEW HALT by explaining risk options evidence requirements and resume conditions.
Check whether a phase has required validation evidence before it can be marked done.
Create update or validate a DEW project brief focused on data engineering scope business purpose and learning objective.
Clarify business decision data consumers stakeholders and decision context before KPI/source work.
Define candidate KPIs formulas grains required fields and source dependencies without claiming feasibility.
Create update or validate a data product PRD with consumers KPIs grain freshness trust expectations and caveats.
Validate whether candidate KPIs can be computed from available fields samples and source evidence before architecture.
Create executable SQL Python or notebook prototype to compute KPI on sample data and produce evidence.
Review KPI feasibility evidence assign feasibility status and trigger HALT if evidence is missing.
